name: DDLC World! 🗺️ A Forever Going Role-Play Adventure! (2500 Follower Special) | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered! | ⚠️ Proxy Recommended! ⚠️
description:
A unique adventure! Dedicated to your very own DDLC World! A scenario that technically, never ends or limits! You start the day getting ready for school! Anything can happen!

For 2500 Followers!

I wanted to give you all something to use forever! If you are able to handle fixing and maintaining your own lore!

This community has grown pretty largely! Very loyal, and very sweet people... That I do not deserve.

As a way to celebrate, I've given you this!

Greetings! I come back to this beloved Bot and have Remastered it! Meaning it is now even better than before! DDLC World is a unique scenario that could technically never end! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff & Role-Play Prioritized! ❤️ — While I had intended this to be used in a Fluff manner, this can be used in quite literally anyway you want! Please do enjoy!

  • DDLC World! 🗺️ — In this scenario! You are in charge! It's a forever going roleplay adventure that YOU can create and write up! Take part in whatever idea you have! I've essentially left it entirely up to YOU!

  • ANYPOV! 👥 — You are not defined in any way, making this ANYPOV! Enjoy! The Doki's will adjust accordingly! 💙

  • Note! 📝 — This was created for those who want more control in my DDLC Bots, and for those that have an idea that I never officially made. So, when you have an idea and notice that I have not made it, you can come here to do it! It's basically the "sandbox" DDLC Bot! - There are many ways to use this, just have fun with it!

  • Proxy Recommend! 👍🏻 — Not needed, but Proxy can help with better responses and better roleplay for this scenario specifically!

  • Remastered! ✅ — This has been Remastered as of March 1st, 2026. - I included a new Introduction Message and more behind the scenes tweaks in the Definitions! Basically, it's better. That's all! 💙

  • Introduction Messages! 📚 — These are the Introduction Messages you may choose from! :)

- Introduction Message 1 (Intended Route) 📗: You will wake up, playing the role as MC. (You are not defined as MC! Just playing in his shoes. I should also note, MC does not exist.) This is basically the original DDLC World experience. If you don't have an idea on your own scenario, you can just use this route instead!

This is perfect for people who just want to hop in, live the life of MC, and call it a day!

(This Introduction Message has been edited and adjusted for the Remaster. But remains the same in nature, nothing major has been changed!)

- Introduction Message 2📗
creator: GhostOfOmi
